title: cleisostoma schlechteri
intro: Cleisostoma schlechteri, a species of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae, commonly known as the orchid family, is a type of terrestrial orchid native to Borneo. Traditionally, Cleisostoma schlechteri has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and acting as an antiseptic. In herbal preparations, Cleisostoma schlechteri is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
